title: Intent/Subnet spec
description: Desired a subnet (a CIDR range) declared in Git (ADR-0059/0110, a named-singleton provisioning Intent). NOT an Entity (§1.2): cardinality-1, correlated desired<->built by (intentKind, name). v2 (ADR-0110) closes the provider-coupling of the `builder:` seam: the Intent names the `provisioning` capability CLASS via `requires`, never a provider (§1.5); the reconcile resolves the bound provider + its build Workflow and surfaces a GATED build (§5 Flow 1), never auto-launches. 'params' is opaque, validated only against the resolved provider's own input Contract (§1.5) — no per-provider network fields here (§1.1).

projectKind.description: The Entity kind the built infra projects AS (default subnet), so Views select it. Carried on the build's Run-provenance projection — NEVER written by the reconcile (§1.2).

labels.description: Selection labels stamped on the built Entity's projection (per-key owned, ADR-0041).

requires.description: The capability CLASSES this singleton Intent depends on to be built (ADR-0110 D1). Must include `provisioning` (the class, never a named provider — §1.5); the reconcile resolves the concrete provider + its build Workflow via the verified-provider index + estate capability-bindings, fail-closed + observable (§1.8) when none resolves.

params.description: Opaque build params passed to the resolved provider, validated against ITS input Contract downstream (§1.5). Never typed here (§1.1).

placement.description: Optional desired topology placement (ADR-0059 decision 5): a Relation cannot be declared in Git (§1.2), so placement's CaC home is the Intent; the build projects the placed-in edge (Run-provenance). Divergence from the observed placement raises a placement-drift Finding (§1.8).

subnet.description: The subnet Entity name this unit is placed in (an Intent/Subnet name) — a placed-in edge.

dmz.description: The dmz Entity name this unit sits in (an in-dmz edge). Distinct from availabilityZone (decision 3: no generic zone).

availabilityZone.description: The availability-zone Entity name this unit sits in (an in-az edge).
